info.title: Scholiq Register
info.description: Register containing all schemas for the Scholiq application. v0.2.0 declares Scholiq's AVG Art. 30 processing activities (learner administration, attendance & leerplicht reporting, grading & assessment, signed attestations, credentialing, data exchange to DUO/OSO/municipality/HR, and AI features) as x-openregister-processing catalogue annotations on LearnerProfile, AttendanceRecord, Assessment, Attestation, Credential, DataExchangeJob, and AiFeature. Each carries purpose (doelbinding), legal basis (rechtsgrond), data categories, backend identifier, retention reference, owner/review fields, and opts the schema into OpenRegister's per-access read-logging (logReads:true, attribution.default referencing the activity code). Seeds arrive as drafts; the school's privacy officer activates them in the OpenRegister lifecycle. Requires OpenRegister >= 0.2.14. See openspec/specs/avg-verwerkingsregister/spec.md.

x-openregister.description: Scholiq — open-source LVS + LMS for Nextcloud compliance training, certification, and learning management.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Issue, verify, and revoke verifiable credentials (EDCI / Open Badges 3.0) attesting completed courses and certifications for learners.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (Credential carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst)

Credential.title: Credential
Credential.description: Verifiable Credential (W3C VC + Open Badges 3.0). Append-only compliance evidence; issued on enrolment completion; supports expiry detection with tiered reminders.

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null for manually issued credentials.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. Null = does not expire.

issuerDid.description: Decentralised Identifier of the issuing organisation.

signature.description: RS256 compact JWS produced by CredentialSigningService.

revocationReason.description: Human-readable revocation reason. Set on revoke transition.

issuedBy.description: Display name of the issuing organisation.

regulationSlug.description: Regulation identifier (e.g. NIS2) inherited from the Course.

enrolmentId.description: UUID of the originating Enrolment that triggered issuance. Used for idempotency (one credential per enrolment). Distinct from renewalEnrolmentId which records the renewal enrolment created on expiry.

renewalEnrolmentId.description: UUID of the renewal Enrolment created on expiry. Written back by OR batch.

verificationUrl.description: Public URL for unauthenticated credential verification.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OpenRegister; do not set directly.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): credentials contain signed PII. Learner sees own record; admins see all. Teachers have no read access — only the credential-holder and admins. Write stays lifecycle-controlled.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Operate adaptive learning paths and AI-assisted item generation; record EU AI Act high-risk decision traces and DPO acknowledgements for transparency and accountability.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (AiFeature carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst)

AiFeature.title: AI Feature
AiFeature.description: An EU AI Act high-risk feature declaration. Lifecycle transitions (disabled → enabled) require DPO acknowledgement via AiFeatureDpoAckGuard before the feature may be activated.

slug.description: Machine-readable identifier, e.g. 'adaptive-learning-paths'. Used as the IAppConfig key suffix for DPO acknowledgement.

description.description: Plain-language description of the AI feature and its EU AI Act risk classification.
description.example: Personalised course sequencing based on learner performance data. Classified as high-risk under EU AI Act Annex III §4(a).

lifecycle.description: Current lifecycle state. Managed by OpenRegister's lifecycle engine; do not set directly.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: A course or training program (Schema.org Course). Lifecycle: draft → published → archived.

mandatoryTraining.description: Whether this course is mandatory training

renewalCourseSlug.description: Slug of the renewal/refresher course for this training

certificateTemplate.description: nc:files path to PDF certificate template

lifecycle.description: Course lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.

parentCourseId.description: UUID of the parent Course. Makes Course recursive — a 'module' is a Course used as a container. Null for top-level courses.

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the CurriculumPlan governing this course. Consumed by the grading spec.

programmeIds.description: UUIDs of Programmes that include this Course.

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: A lesson / learning module within a Course (Schema.org LearningResource). Lifecycle: draft → published → retired.

contentRef.description: nc:files path, cmi5 launch URL, or LTI link

mandatoryTraining.description: Whether this lesson is tagged as mandatory training

regulationSlug.description: Regulation identifier for mandatory-training compliance tracking (e.g. NIS2, AVG, BIO)

lifecycle.description: Lesson lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine; do not set directly.

XapiStatement.title: XapiStatement
XapiStatement.description: xAPI 1.0.3 statement stored in the LRS substrate (append-only per ADR-002). Every save emits xapi.statement.received audit entry.

verb.description: xAPI Verb with id IRI and display map

object.description: xAPI Activity, Agent, SubStatement, or StatementRef

result.description: xAPI Result (score, success, completion, duration, extensions)

context.description: xAPI Context (registration, instructor, team, contextActivities, extensions)

timestamp.description: When the event described by the statement occurred

stored.description: When the statement was received and stored by the LRS

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this statement relates to (Scholiq denormalisation)

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson this statement relates to (Scholiq denormalisation)

verified_actor_id.description: Server-trusted learner identifier stamped by the xAPI ingest controller after authenticating the sender. NEVER derived from payload.actor.*. XapiCompletionHandler reads ONLY this field to prevent credential forgery (C6).

x-openregister-authorization._comment: SB1 (wave-12): xapi-statement creation is admin-only as a stopgap until a dedicated xAPI ingest controller stamps verified_actor_id server-side. Prevents any authenticated user from forging xAPI statements with attacker-controlled verified_actor_id values. Track: issue #TBD.

Enrolment.title: Enrolment
Enrolment.description: Learner enrolment in a course (Schema.org EnrollmentRequest)

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the enrolled learner.

courseId.description: UUID of the Course object in the scholiq register.

mandatory.description: When true this enrolment is a compliance-mandatory assignment.

dueDate.description: ISO date by which the learner must complete the course. Null means no deadline.

managerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's line manager. Used for overdue alerts and fallback notifications.

bulkJobId.description: Browser-generated UUID grouping all Enrolments created by a single bulk-enrol modal submission. Used for polling progress.

reason.description: Free-text reason captured on withdrawal or failure transitions.

regulationSlug.description: Machine-readable slug of the linked compliance regulation, e.g. 'avg-2018'. Used by compliance-audit to group evidence.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this enrolment is associated with. Null for individually enrolled learners not in a cohort.

subject.nl: Je bent ingeschreven voor een verplichte cursus
subject.en: You have been enrolled in a mandatory course

subject.nl: Je verplichte cursus moet binnenkort afgerond zijn
subject.en: Your mandatory course is due soon

subject.nl: Een verplichte cursus van een medewerker is over tijd
subject.en: An employee's mandatory course is overdue

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): enrolment records are per-student PII. Learner sees own record; managers see their reports; admins see all.

Regulation.title: Regulation
Regulation.description: Compliance regulation (AVG, BIO, NIS2, etc.) tracked for mandatory training coverage.

description.description: Plain-language description of the regulation and its applicability.

applicabilityCriteria.description: Free-text applicability criteria describing which roles or departments must comply.

requiresAnnualRenewal.description: Whether this regulation requires annual recertification.

renewalCycleMonths.description: Renewal cycle in months (e.g. 12 for annual).

active.description: Whether this regulation is currently enforced.

ragRedThreshold.description: Coverage % below which RAG status is red.

ragAmberThreshold.description: Coverage % below which RAG status is amber (and at or above ragRedThreshold).

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

coveragePercent.description: Live coverage % = (mandatoryCompletedCount / mandatoryEnrolledCount) × 100. Returns 0 when no enrolments exist.

ragStatus.description: RAG status band: green ≥ ragAmberThreshold, amber ≥ ragRedThreshold, red < ragRedThreshold.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Record that a learner completed mandatory compliance training (AVG / BIO / NIS2 / Cyberbeveiligingswet) and capture the signed attestation as legal evidence, including the actor's IP address for non-repudiation.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (Attestation carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; signed evidence is typically retained per the school's selectielijst)

Attestation.title: Attestation
Attestation.description: Signed learner attestation that mandatory training was completed and understood. Append-only per ADR-008; HMAC-signed at lifecycle transition via AttestationSigningGuard.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID or external learner identifier.

lessonId.description: ID of the Lesson that was attested.

courseId.description: ID of the Course containing the attested lesson.

regulationSlug.description: Slug of the Regulation this attestation is captured for.

actorIp.description: IP address of the learner at time of attestation, for audit purposes.

employeeId.description: HR system employee identifier, if available.

score.description: Assessment score at time of attestation, if applicable.

xapiStatementId.description: ID of the cmi5.completed XapiStatement that triggered this attestation.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature computed by AttestationSigningGuard at the drafted→signed transition.

signingKeyId.description: OR tenant-key rotation ID used to compute the signature. Required for offline verification.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Record training a learner completed outside the LMS (classroom, third-party, conference) as first-class compliance evidence, with an officer verification gate and evidence file attachments, so that compliance coverage reflects real-world completions instead of forcing fake in-app enrolments.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (verified external-training records are compliance evidence, typically retained per the school selectielijst alongside attestations)

ExternalTrainingRecord.title: ExternalTrainingRecord
ExternalTrainingRecord.description: An externally-completed training (classroom, third-party e-learning, conference, on-the-job) recorded per learner with evidence file attachments and an officer verification gate. A verified, unexpired record counts as compliance evidence for a matching regulation.

learnerId.description: UUID of the LearnerProfile this record belongs to.

title.description: Human-readable training title, e.g. "NIS2 board awareness session".

regulationSlug.description: Optional Regulation.slug this training provides coverage for (links into compliance coverage). Null = no regulation link.

courseId.description: Optional UUID of an in-app Course considered equivalent.

validUntil.description: Optional expiry of the coverage this record provides. When set and in the past, the record no longer counts toward coverage.

evidenceNote.description: Free-text note describing the evidence (e.g. "signed attendance list attached").

submittedBy.description: NC user ID of the person who recorded the training.

verifiedBy.description: NC user ID of the officer/HR/admin who verified the record. Must differ from submittedBy when the learner self-submitted.

rejectionReason.description: Reason captured when the record is rejected.

credentialId.description: Optional UUID of a manual Credential issued on verification (links external certificates into the certification expiry machinery).

batchId.description: Identifier shared by all records created together in one bulk classroom-session entry, so a batch can be verified and audited together.

lifecycle.description: Verification lifecycle state.

subject.nl: Nieuwe externe training '{{title}}' wacht op verificatie

x-property-rbac._comment: External-training records carry PII (provider, evidence). Learner sees own record; compliance-officer/hr/admin see all and perform verification. Write stays lifecycle-controlled.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Maintain the core learner record (identity, school enrolment, affiliation, guardians) required to deliver education, register results, and meet statutory reporting obligations. Includes the encrypted BSN, ECK iD, and SchoolID used for pseudonymised exchange.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (LearnerProfile carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst onderwijs)

LearnerProfile.title: LearnerProfile
LearnerProfile.description: Scholiq learner profile. Owns role assignment and is the actor reference for enrolments, credentials, and attestations.

ncUserId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner.

bsnEncrypted.description: Encrypted BSN — only populated for K-12 or government tenants. MUST be the base64-encoded ICrypto ciphertext; raw/plaintext BSNs are rejected by the minLength + pattern constraints below.

eckId.description: ECK iD for Dutch education identity federation.

roles.description: One or more Scholiq roles. The highest-priority role is materialised as primaryRole.

parentIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of linked parent/guardian accounts.

managerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's line manager.

department.description: Organisational department for grouping and reporting.

active.description: Profile is active for the learner.

merged.description: Profile merged into another LearnerProfile (e.g. duplicate SchoolID/ECK iD reconciliation); retained for audit + back-reference resolution.

deleted.description: Soft-deleted on offboarding; retained per AVG retention class until purge window expires.

transitions.name: merge
transitions.description: Merges this profile into another LearnerProfile. The surviving profile is referenced via mergedInto.

transitions.name: delete
transitions.description: Soft-deletes the profile on offboarding. Purge after retention class expires.

primaryRole.description: Highest-priority Scholiq role for this learner, resolved by RoleSelector (admin group override + static priority map).

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): learner-profile contains personal data (parentIds, department, etc.). Learner sees own profile; admins see all.

Programme.title: Programme
Programme.description: A named educational or training track (HBO-V bachelor, NIS2 board certification, vmbo-tl examenjaar). Aggregates courses, declares a credential to issue on completion, and points at one CurriculumPlan.

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the governing CurriculumPlan. Null until a plan is assigned.

courseIds.description: Ordered list of Course UUIDs that form the programme's content spine.

credentialTemplateId.description: UUID of the Credential template to issue on programme completion. Null = no auto-issuance.

lifecycle.description: Programme lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

CurriculumPlan.title: CurriculumPlan
CurriculumPlan.description: The governing assessment plan for a Programme. Carries the ordered component list (kolommen), weight per component, roll-up formula, grade scale, pass rules, and period structure. Profiles: PTA (Dutch VO), OER/studiegids (HE), opleidingsplan (MBO), training-curriculum (corporate), generic.

requiredCourseIds.description: UUIDs of courses that are mandatory in this plan.

electiveCourseIds.description: UUIDs of elective / optional courses in this plan.

components.description: Assessment component definitions (kolommen). Each entry maps to one grade component with its weight, period, and kind.

componentId.description: Stable identifier for this component within the plan.

weight.description: Relative weight of this component in the roll-up formula. E.g. 3 means this kolom contributes 3x.

period.description: Period identifier or number this component belongs to.

formula.description: Roll-up formula for computing the final grade from weighted components.

gradeScaleId.description: UUID of the GradeScale object (grading spec). Null = default 1-10 Dutch scale.

componentId.description: If set: applies to that specific component. If null: applies to the final grade.

minValue.description: Minimum passing value (e.g. 5.5 on Dutch 1-10 scale).

periods.description: Period definitions (e.g. SE-periodes for PTA, blokken for HE).

lifecycle.description: Plan lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

Cohort.title: Cohort
Cohort.description: A group of learners doing a Course or Programme together in a given period. Members are LearnerProfile UUIDs; backed by a Nextcloud group for permissioning. Lifecycle: planned → active → completed | archived.

name.description: Human-readable cohort name, e.g. '3H Biologie 2025-2026' or 'NIS2 Batch A'.

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme this cohort runs. Null for standalone course cohorts.

courseId.description: UUID of the specific Course this cohort runs (for standalone course cohorts).

teacherIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of assigned teachers / instructors.

learnerIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of the LearnerProfile owners enrolled in this cohort.

ncGroupId.description: Backing Nextcloud group ID used for file sharing and permissioning. Null until the cohort is activated.

academicYear.description: Academic or training year in YYYY or YYYY-YYYY format.

lifecycle.description: Cohort lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: A scheduled occurrence of a Cohort meeting: a les, hoorcollege, or workshop. Carries start/end datetime, location (room or online URL), attached Materials, and linked Assignments. The unit a teacher takes attendance against.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this session belongs to.

courseId.description: UUID of the Course covered in this session. Null for administrative / non-content sessions.

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson covered in this session. Null when not tied to a specific lesson.

startsAt.description: ISO 8601 start timestamp of the session.

endsAt.description: ISO 8601 end timestamp of the session.

location.description: Room code or online URL (MS Teams, Zoom, etc.).

materialIds.description: UUIDs of Material objects attached to this session.

assignmentIds.description: UUIDs of Assignment objects linked to this session (forward reference to the assignments spec).

lifecycle.description: Session lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Metadata for a file, presentation, reading, video, or SCORM/cmi5 package attached to a Course, Lesson, or Session. The bytes live in OpenRegister's native file attachments; this schema carries type, license, LOM-style tags, and ordering.

fileRef.description: OpenRegister file attachment reference (nc:files path or OR attachment ID). The app does NOT store file bytes.

url.description: External URL for kind='link' materials. Null for file-backed materials.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or rights statement.

lomTags.description: NL-LOM / VDEX keyword tags for discoverability.

order.description: Display order within its parent (Course, Lesson, or Session). Lower values appear first.

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this material is attached to. Null if attached at Lesson or Session level.

lessonId.description: UUID of the Lesson this material is attached to. Null if attached at Course or Session level.

sessionId.description: UUID of the Session this material is attached to. Null if attached at Course or Lesson level.

Rubric.title: Rubric
Rubric.description: Reusable marking scheme with weighted criteria and level descriptors. A teacher attaches a Rubric to an Assignment; when marking a Submission the teacher picks a level per criterion and the points sum becomes the proposed grade.

description.description: Optional explanation of the rubric's purpose and use.

criteria.description: Ordered list of assessment criteria, each with weight and achievement levels.

weight.description: Relative weight of this criterion. Used to compute the criterion's contribution to maxPoints.

levels.description: Achievement levels from lowest to highest (e.g. insufficient, sufficient, good, excellent).

points.description: Points awarded when a learner achieves this level.

maxPoints.description: Declared maximum possible score (sum of the top level across all criteria). Derived field; prefer x-openregister-calculations.computedMaxPoints.

lifecycle.description: Rubric lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

computedMaxPoints.description: Sum of the highest points level across all criteria.

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: A deliverable that learners hand in: title, instructions, due date, rubric, and submission window. Belongs to a Course, Session, or both. Linked to a CurriculumPlan component to enable grade roll-up.

instructions.description: Rich-text instructions for the learner. Stored as HTML or Markdown.

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this assignment belongs to. Null when only attached to a Session.

sessionId.description: UUID of the Session this assignment belongs to. Null when only attached at Course level.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this assignment targets. Null for course-wide assignments.

curriculumPlanComponentId.description: Stable componentId from the parent CurriculumPlan.components array that this assignment scores. Used by the grading spec to map submissions to grade columns.

briefingMaterialIds.description: UUIDs of Material objects provided as briefing resources for this assignment.

dueAt.description: Submission deadline. Null for open-ended assignments.

maxPoints.description: Maximum points a learner can earn on this assignment.

allowLateSubmission.description: Whether late submissions are accepted after dueAt. When false, SubmissionWindowGuard blocks submission after dueAt.

latePenaltyPercent.description: Percentage deducted from the proposed grade for late submissions (0–100).

rubricId.description: UUID of the Rubric used to grade submissions. Null for unstructured/holistic grading.

groupSubmission.description: When true, a Submission may list multiple learnerIds (group hand-in).

visibleFrom.description: Earliest datetime at which the assignment is visible to learners. Null = immediately visible.

visibleUntil.description: Latest datetime at which the assignment is visible to learners. Null = always visible after publication.

plagiarismProvider.description: Pluggable plagiarism-check provider identifier (e.g. 'turnitin', 'ouriginal'). Resolved to OCA\Scholiq\Plagiarism\ProvidesPlagiarismCheck at runtime. No built-in provider — hook only.

lifecycle.description: Assignment lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

isOverdue.description: True when dueAt is set and is in the past.

submissionCount.description: Total number of Submission objects linked to this Assignment.

gradedCount.description: Number of Submissions with a non-null proposedGrade.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: A learner's (or group's) hand-in for an Assignment. Carries file attachment references (bytes live in OpenRegister file attachments), rubric scores from the teacher's marking, and the proposed grade before it becomes a GradeEntry via the grading spec.

assignmentId.description: UUID of the Assignment this submission is for.

learnerIds.description: Nextcloud user IDs of the learner(s) who submitted. One entry for solo submissions; multiple for group submissions.

attachmentRefs.description: OpenRegister file attachment references (nc:files paths or OR attachment IDs). The app does NOT store file bytes.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the learner dispatched the `submit` transition. Null while in draft.

feedbackText.description: Free-text teacher feedback returned to the learner when the Submission is returned.

gradeEntryId.description: UUID of the GradeEntry created/updated by the grading spec when the teacher marks this submission. Set by the grading spec; read-only from this spec's perspective.

rubricScores.description: Teacher's per-criterion marking against the Rubric. Each entry records which level was achieved and the points awarded.

points.description: Points awarded for this criterion (from the selected level).

proposedGrade.description: Sum of rubricScores[].points as entered by the teacher. Null before marking. Reduced by Assignment.latePenaltyPercent when isLate is true to yield effectiveGrade.

lifecycle.description: Submission lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

isLate.description: True when the submission lifecycle is `late`.

effectiveGrade.description: proposedGrade reduced by Assignment.latePenaltyPercent when isLate is true. Null before marking.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): submissions contain learner responses and grades — academic PII. Learner sees own submissions; admins see all.

ItemBank.title: ItemBank
ItemBank.description: A reusable collection of QTI 3.0 assessment items grouped by subject. Item banks are shared across multiple Assessments and cohorts.

name.description: Display name of this item bank.

description.description: Optional description of the item bank.

subject.description: Subject or topic area (e.g. 'Mathematics'). Null = cross-subject.

itemIds.description: UUIDs of Items belonging to this bank.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

itemCount.description: Number of items in this bank (length of itemIds array).

Item.title: Item
Item.description: A QTI 3.0 assessment item. Canonical stored form is QTI 3.0; QTI 2.x and Common Cartridge items are converted on import by QtiImportService.

itemBankId.description: UUID of the owning ItemBank. Null for standalone items.

qtiBody.description: QTI 3.0 item body XML/JSON. Canonical stored form.

correctResponse.description: Correct response declaration. Null for extendedText/essay items which require manual scoring.

maxScore.description: Maximum score achievable for this item.

subjectTags.description: Subject or topic tags for cross-bank searching.

difficulty.description: IRT difficulty parameter in range 0..1. Null = not calibrated.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

needsManualScoring.description: True when the item cannot be auto-scored (extendedText or null correctResponse).

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Administer assessments and record grades, results, and final marks to evaluate learner progress and award qualifications.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (Assessment carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst onderwijs)

Assessment.title: Assessment
Assessment.description: A structured test (toets, tentamen, examen, quiz) composed of items from an ItemBank with a scoring scheme, time limit, attempt policy, availability window, and optional proctoring. AI-assisted proctoring requires an AiFeature registration (ADR-005 DPO gate).

description.description: Optional description or instructions for the assessment.

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null if scoped to session or cohort only.

sessionId.description: UUID of the associated Session. Null if scoped to course or cohort only.

cohortId.description: UUID of the associated Cohort. Null if scoped to course or session only.

points.description: Per-assessment point override for this item.

itemRefs.description: Items referenced from the ItemBank with per-assessment point overrides.

scoringScheme.description: Scoring scheme: points (raw total), passMark (threshold), or IRT.

passMark.description: Minimum score to pass. Required when scoringScheme is passMark.

timeLimitMinutes.description: Time limit in minutes. Null = untimed.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of attempts a learner may make.

keepScore.description: Which attempt score to use when maxAttempts > 1.

availableFrom.description: ISO-8601 datetime from which the assessment is available to learners.

availableUntil.description: ISO-8601 datetime after which the assessment is no longer available.

provider.description: Proctoring adapter identifier; resolves to ProvidesProctoring.

flagReviewMode.description: Flag review mode. ai-assisted requires an AiFeature with slug assessment-ai-proctor-review in enabled state (ADR-005).

gradeEntryComponentId.description: CurriculumPlan componentId for the GradeEntry feed (grading spec, forward-ref).

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

itemCount.description: Number of item references in this assessment.

isProctored.description: True when proctoring configuration is non-null.

isAvailable.description: True when now is within the availableFrom/availableUntil window.

AssessmentResult.title: AssessmentResult
AssessmentResult.description: A learner's attempt at an Assessment. Append-only — a finished attempt is immutable evidence. Auto-scored items receive autoScore on the submit transition; essay items remain null until a teacher provides manualScore.

assessmentId.description: UUID of the Assessment being attempted.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner taking the assessment.

attemptNumber.description: Attempt sequence number for this learner on this assessment.

response.description: Learner's response data (type depends on interactionType).

autoScore.description: Score assigned by auto-scoring. Null if not yet scored or needsManualScoring.

manualScore.description: Score assigned by a teacher. Required for extendedText items before grading.

responses.description: Per-item responses with auto and manual scores.

startedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the attempt was started.

submittedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the attempt was submitted. Null while in-progress.

proctoringSessionId.description: UUID of the associated ProctoringSession. Null for unproctored attempts.

gradeEntryId.description: UUID of the GradeEntry created for this result (grading spec, forward-ref).

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

autoScore.description: Sum of all responses[].autoScore (null scores treated as 0).

totalScore.description: Sum of autoScore and all manualScores.

passed.description: True when totalScore >= Assessment.passMark and scoringScheme is passMark. Null when not applicable.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): assessment results contain responses and scores — student PII. Learner sees own results; admins see all.

ProctoringSession.title: ProctoringSession
ProctoringSession.description: Created when a proctored Assessment is started. Append-only — a completed session is immutable evidence. Flags raised by the provider are reviewed by an invigilator; a flag NEVER auto-alters the associated AssessmentResult (EU AI Act Art. 14 human oversight).

assessmentResultId.description: UUID of the AssessmentResult this session covers.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner being proctored.

provider.description: Proctoring adapter identifier; resolves to ProvidesProctoring implementation.

providerSessionId.description: Provider-side session identifier. Null until the provider confirms creation.

recordedArtefactRefs.description: URLs or OR attachment refs for recorded artefacts. Actual bytes stay with the provider.

occurredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the event occurred.

reviewDecision.description: Invigilator decision. Changed ONLY by a human invigilator — never by automated logic (EU AI Act Art. 14).

reviewedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the invigilator who reviewed this flag.

reviewedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the review decision.

flags.description: Flagged proctoring events. Each flag requires invigilator review before any consequence is applied to the learner.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR's lifecycle engine.

pendingFlagCount.description: Number of flags awaiting invigilator review.

hasAnnulledFlag.description: True when at least one flag has been annulled by an invigilator.

GradeScale.title: GradeScale
GradeScale.description: A named grading scale defining the value range, bands, rounding rule, and pass threshold for marks. Supports numeric (NL 1.0–10.0), letter (A–F), ECTS (A–F), pass/fail, percentage, and custom band sets.

kind.description: Discriminator for how values and bands are interpreted.

bands.description: Ordered grade bands (for letter/ects/band kinds). Each band covers a value range and carries a pass flag.

bandId.description: Stable identifier for this band, e.g. 'A', 'B', 'voldoende'.

minValue.description: Inclusive lower bound of the raw value range for this band.

maxValue.description: Inclusive upper bound of the raw value range for this band.

pass.description: Whether this band is considered passing.

min.description: Minimum possible value (for numeric/percentage kinds). Null for band-based scales.

max.description: Maximum possible value (for numeric/percentage kinds). Null for band-based scales.

passThreshold.description: Minimum value required to pass (for numeric/percentage kinds). Values below this threshold yield passed=false.

roundingRule.description: Rounding rule applied before comparing to passThreshold or displaying the grade.

lifecycle.description: Scale lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

bandCount.description: Number of bands defined on this scale.

GradeEntry.title: GradeEntry
GradeEntry.description: One mark on one CurriculumPlan component for one learner. Starts as concept (editable); a teacher publishes it to notify the learner (and parents) and feed the FinalGrade roll-up. Once published, it can only move to revised (new value with audit trail). Not appendOnly — concept entries are editable; lifecycle enforces immutability once published.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner this mark belongs to.

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the CurriculumPlan this entry contributes to.

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null when scope is set via cohort only.

submissionId.description: UUID of the Submission that originated this mark (set when sourceKind=assignment-submission).

assessmentResultId.description: UUID of the AssessmentResult that originated this mark (set when sourceKind=assessment-result).

sessionId.description: UUID of the Session that originated this mark (set when sourceKind=participation).

value.description: Raw mark value on the component's GradeScale (e.g. 7.5 for NL numeric).

gradeScaleId.description: UUID of the GradeScale used to interpret and display this value.

weight.description: Per-entry weight override. Null means fall back to the matching CurriculumPlan.components[].weight.

grader.description: Nextcloud user ID of the teacher who entered this mark.

gradedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the grade was entered.

comment.description: Optional free-text feedback or annotation from the grader.

lifecycle.description: Entry lifecycle state. Concept = editable, published = immutable + notified, revised = superseded by a new published entry.

effectiveWeight.description: The per-entry weight if set, else the matching CurriculumPlan.components[].weight. Used by FinalGrade roll-up.

pointsContributed.description: Value multiplied by effectiveWeight — the raw contribution of this entry to the weighted sum.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): grade entries are sensitive academic PII. Learner sees own grades; admins see all.

FinalGrade.title: FinalGrade
FinalGrade.description: Calculated roll-up per learner per Course or Programme. Recomputed whenever a GradeEntry for this (learnerId, curriculumPlanId) publishes — applying the CurriculumPlan.formula over the learner's published GradeEntries. No lifecycle — it is fully derived. Read-only from the frontend.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner this grade belongs to.

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this final grade applies to. Null for programme-level grades.

programmeId.description: UUID of the Programme this final grade applies to. Null for course-level grades.

curriculumPlanId.description: UUID of the CurriculumPlan whose formula is applied.

gradeScaleId.description: UUID of the GradeScale used to interpret the computed value.

value.description: Computed final grade value. Null before any GradeEntry has published. Derived — do not set manually.

passed.description: Whether the learner has passed, per the formula + passRules + GradeScale.passThreshold. Null before enough entries have published.

breakdown.description: Per-period averages and per-component contributions as a JSON object. Derived — do not set manually.

lastRecomputedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last recompute triggered by a GradeEntry publish.

publishedEntries.description: Cross-schema aggregation: pull all published GradeEntries for this learner + curriculumPlan. Used as input to the formula evaluation.

value.description: Computed by GradeFormulaEvaluator using CurriculumPlan.formula over publishedEntries.

passed.description: Boolean verdict from GradeFormulaEvaluator, accounting for passRules and GradeScale.passThreshold.

breakdown.description: Per-period and per-component contribution breakdown from GradeFormulaEvaluator.

calculatedChange.description: Recompute this FinalGrade whenever a GradeEntry for (learnerId, curriculumPlanId) publishes. Implemented via GradeRollupHandler listening on ObjectTransitionedEvent — NOT a TimedJob.

x-property-rbac._comment: WF1 (wave-12): final grades are academic PII. Learner sees own final grade; admins see all.

LearningPlanTemplate.title: Learning Plan Template
LearningPlanTemplate.description: Pre-structures a LearningPlan for a given kind (opp, handelingsplan, iep, pdp, idp, generic). Defines sections, goal domains, required signer roles, and default review cadence.

name.description: Human-readable template name, e.g. 'OPP VO sector 2026'.

kind.description: Plan profile this template applies to.

description.description: Optional longer description of the template.

sections.description: Ordered sections that pre-structure the LearningPlan.

goalDomains.description: Allowed goal domains, e.g. ['leren-en-ontwikkeling','werkhouding','sociaal-emotioneel','fysiek-medisch'] for OPP.

requiredSignerRoles.description: Roles that must sign a plan version before it can activate, e.g. ['learner','parent','coordinator'].

defaultReviewCadenceMonths.description: How often (in months) a plan based on this template should be reviewed.

lifecycle.description: Template lifecycle state.

LearningPlan.title: Learning Plan
LearningPlan.description: Individual learning plan per learner (OPP, handelingsplan, IEP, PDP, IDP or generic). Versioned — a material revision creates a new version that must be re-signed before it can activate.

learnerId.description: NC user ID of the learner this plan belongs to.

templateId.description: UUID of the LearningPlanTemplate that pre-structures this plan. Null for free-form plans.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort the learner belongs to (optional context).

courseId.description: UUID of the Course this plan is associated with (optional).

coordinatorId.description: NC user ID of the responsible learning-support coordinator.

supportMeasures.description: Support measures in place to achieve the goals.

reviewCadenceMonths.description: How often (in months) this plan should be reviewed.

nextReviewAt.description: Date of next scheduled review. Null until set after initial activation.

version.description: Version counter. Each material revision that requires re-signing increments this.

supersedesId.description: UUID of the prior LearningPlan version this version supersedes.

lifecycle.description: Plan lifecycle state.

nextReviewDue.description: True when nextReviewAt is not null and <= today.

isFullySigned.description: True when every required signer role (from template) has a Signature on this version with sufficient assurance. Evaluated by LearningPlanSignatureGuard on activate.

LearningPlanEvaluation.title: Learning Plan Evaluation
LearningPlanEvaluation.description: A dated evaluation record for a LearningPlan review point. Append-only — evaluations are immutable audit evidence once recorded.

learningPlanId.description: UUID of the LearningPlan being evaluated.

evaluatedAt.description: Date of the evaluation / review meeting.

evaluatedBy.description: NC user ID of the coordinator or teacher who led the evaluation.

goalOutcomes.description: Outcome for each goal evaluated in this review.

attendeeIds.description: NC user IDs of meeting attendees (learner, parents, teachers, etc.).

nextReviewAt.description: Next review date as agreed in this evaluation. Written back to LearningPlan.nextReviewAt by LearningPlanEvaluationHandler.

lifecycle.description: Evaluation lifecycle state.

Signature.title: Signature
Signature.description: Co-sign record for a specific LearningPlan version. Append-only — signatures are immutable audit evidence. DigiD/eIDAS handshake is out of scope; this schema only records who signed which version when and with what assurance.

subjectKind.description: Kind of the subject being signed. Currently always learning-plan.

subjectId.description: UUID of the LearningPlan being signed.

subjectVersion.description: Version of the LearningPlan being signed.

signerId.description: NC user ID (or external identifier) of the person signing.

signerRole.description: Role of the signer in relation to the plan.

signedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the signing action.

assuranceLevel.description: eIDAS assurance level of the signing method used.

evidenceRef.description: Optional reference to signing evidence (e.g. redirect log, scan URL).

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Register attendance and absences and report verzuim to the leerplichtambtenaar / DUO as required by the Leerplichtwet.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (AttendanceRecord carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst onderwijs)

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Per-Session per-learner attendance fact. Records whether a learner was present, absent, late, or left early. Not appendOnly — a teacher may correct a mis-marked record; OR's update audit trail is sufficient.

sessionId.description: UUID of the Session this record belongs to.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner.

cohortId.description: Denormalised Cohort UUID for filtering. Derived from the Session.

minutesAttended.description: Actual minutes the learner was present. Null when fully absent.

markedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the teacher or coordinator who marked attendance.

markedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when attendance was marked.

reason.description: Optional free-text reason note from the teacher.

excuseRequestId.description: UUID of the ExcuseRequest that flipped this record to absent-excused.

lesuren.description: Derived lesuren count. When attended (present/late/left-early): minutesAttended / 60. When fully absent: session.durationMinutes / 60. Used for the 16-lesuur leerplicht threshold.

ExcuseRequest.title: ExcuseRequest
ExcuseRequest.description: Absence excuse submitted by a learner, parent, or 18+ learner-self for a date range. On approval, matching AttendanceRecords are flipped to absent-excused by ExcuseApprovalHandler.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner whose absence is being excused.

submittedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the submitter (may be a parent or the 18+ learner themselves).

dateFrom.description: First date of the absence period (inclusive, ISO 8601 date).

dateTo.description: Last date of the absence period (inclusive, ISO 8601 date).

reasonKind.description: Structured reason category for reporting purposes.

attachmentRef.description: Optional reference to a supporting document (doctor's note, etc.).

submittedAuthLevel.description: eIDAS assurance level of the submission flow. The DigiD handshake itself is out of scope; this field records the achieved level.

decidedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the coordinator who approved or rejected.

decisionNote.description: Optional note from the coordinator explaining the decision.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

AttendanceThreshold.title: AttendanceThreshold
AttendanceThreshold.description: Configurable threshold rule that watches learner attendance over a window and fires when the metric crosses the limit. The leerplicht-16uur kind is the Dutch Leerplichtwet art. 21a profile. Crossing detection uses the same calculatedChange mechanism as Regulation.ragStatus — NOT a TimedJob (ADR-022).

kind.description: Profile kind. leerplicht-16uur is the Leerplichtwet art. 21a profile (16 unexcused lesuren in 4 rolling weeks).

scope.description: Whether the threshold applies per individual learner or aggregated per cohort.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort this threshold applies to. Null = applies to all cohorts in the tenant.

weeks.description: Number of rolling weeks (when type is rolling-weeks). E.g. 4 for the leerplicht 4-week window.

metric.description: Metric being measured. unexcused-lesuren counts lesuren from AttendanceRecords with status absent-unexcused.

limit.description: Threshold value. E.g. 16 for the leerplicht rule.

lesuurMinutes.description: Minutes per lesuur, used when metric is unexcused-lesuren. Default 60.

onCross.description: Action to take when the threshold is crossed.

notify.description: Whether to send notifications to notifyRoles.

notifyRoles.description: Tenant roles to notify on crossing (e.g. ["mentor", "coordinator"]).

createFlag.description: Whether to create an AttendanceFlag on crossing.

dataExchangeTarget.description: If set, a DataExchangeJob is queued to this target (e.g. 'leerplicht'). Requires the data-exchange spec. TODO(data-exchange spec).

active.description: Whether this threshold rule is currently enforced.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

unexcusedLesuren.description: Rolling sum of unexcused lesuren for each learner in the threshold's scope and window. When this value reaches or exceeds `limit`, the threshold is crossed. Reuses the same calculatedChange mechanism as Regulation.ragStatus — NOT a TimedJob (ADR-022).

isThresholdCrossed.description: True when unexcusedLesuren >= limit. Drives the onThresholdCrossed notification.

subject.en: Attendance threshold crossed for a learner

AttendanceFlag.title: AttendanceFlag
AttendanceFlag.description: Created when an AttendanceThreshold is crossed. appendOnly: true per ADR-008 (immutable audit evidence). The flag tracks the mentor's intervention and any outbound leerplicht report via its lifecycle. It NEVER auto-acts against the learner — human-in-the-loop throughout.

subject.nl: Er is een aanwezigheidsmelding voor je aangemaakt
subject.en: An attendance flag was raised for you

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner who crossed the threshold.

attendanceThresholdId.description: UUID of the AttendanceThreshold that was crossed.

cohortId.description: UUID of the Cohort in context when the threshold was crossed.

windowStart.description: Start date of the measurement window in which the threshold was crossed.

windowEnd.description: End date of the measurement window in which the threshold was crossed.

metricValue.description: The metric value at the moment of crossing (e.g. 16 lesuren).

breachingRecordIds.description: UUIDs of the AttendanceRecords that collectively pushed the metric over the limit.

dataExchangeJobId.description: UUID of the DataExchangeJob queued to the configured target (e.g. leerplichtambtenaar). Null until the job is created. TODO(data-exchange spec).

mentorId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner's mentor, resolved from LearnerProfile.managerId at flag creation.

lifecycle.description: Flag lifecycle state. Managed by OR lifecycle engine.

daysSinceFlag.description: Number of days since the flag was created (windowEnd as proxy). Helps the mentor dashboard sort by urgency.

DataMappingProfile.title: DataMappingProfile
DataMappingProfile.description: Declares how a Scholiq schema maps to an external target for data exchange. The mapping is used by DataExchangeJob to transform Scholiq objects into the payload sent to OpenConnector. No wire protocols are implemented here — the named target is an OpenConnector connection.

name.description: Human-readable name for this mapping profile (e.g. 'BRON/ROD learner export').

target.description: Named OpenConnector connection: bron-rod | oso | leerplicht | surfconext | hr | or a custom name. This is a reference to an OpenConnector source/target configuration — Scholiq implements no wire protocol.

direction.description: Direction of data flow: export (Scholiq → external), import (external → Scholiq), or sync (bidirectional).

sourceSchema.description: Slug of the Scholiq schema being mapped (e.g. 'learner-profile'). Any Scholiq schema can be a source.

targetSchema.description: External schema identifier (free-form, e.g. 'DUO:LeerlingV2', 'OSO:Dossier'). Interpreted by the OpenConnector target.

fieldMappings.description: Ordered list of field-level mappings from Scholiq to target schema.

scholiqField.description: Property path in the Scholiq source object (dot-notation for nested, e.g. 'birthDate').

targetField.description: Property path in the external target schema.

transform.description: Named transform to apply: 'bsn-to-pseudonym' (use eckId, never bsnEncrypted), 'date-iso8601', 'cohort-to-brin', or null for passthrough.

validationProfile.description: Named external-schema validation profile to run before the job leaves the queue. Null = no pre-flight validation.

active.description: Whether this profile is active. Inactive profiles are not available for new jobs.

lifecycle.description: Profile lifecycle state.

x-openregister-processing.doelbinding: Exchange learner and result data with external systems (DUO/BRON-ROD, OSO overstapdossier, municipality leerplicht, HR systems) over the agreed standards to meet statutory reporting and transfer obligations.
x-openregister-processing.retentionReference: not declared (DataExchangeJob carries no x-openregister-archival annotation; align with the school's selectielijst onderwijs)

DataExchangeJob.title: DataExchangeJob
DataExchangeJob.description: A request to push or pull data between Scholiq and an external system via an OpenConnector named connection. Scholiq implements no wire protocols — the job delegates entirely to OpenConnector. For OSO transfers, the job enters pending-parent-review before execution to allow parent approval of the dossier.

direction.description: Direction of data flow: export (Scholiq → external), import (external → Scholiq), or sync (bidirectional).

target.description: Named OpenConnector connection (e.g. 'bron-rod', 'oso', 'leerplicht', 'surfconext', 'hr'). Scholiq implements no Edukoppeling/StUF/OSO-XML/Digikoppeling/SAML wire code — all protocol logic lives in OpenConnector.

mappingProfileId.description: UUID of the DataMappingProfile to use for field transformation. Null = use raw Scholiq object.

scope.description: Describes which Scholiq objects are in scope for this job.

schema.description: Slug of the Scholiq schema to export/import (e.g. 'learner-profile').

filters.description: Key-value filters to narrow the scope (passed to ObjectService::findAll).

cohortId.description: Limit scope to a specific cohort. Null = all cohorts.

period.description: ISO 8601 period or term identifier (e.g. '2025-2026/1'). Null = no period filter.

format.description: Output format hint (e.g. 'stuf-ebb', 'oso-xml'). Resolved by the OpenConnector target; Scholiq does not produce this format.

requestedBy.description: Nextcloud user ID of the user who requested this job.

requestedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the job was requested.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the job started executing. Null until running.

finishedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the job finished. Null until completed.

result.description: Job execution result, populated when the job finishes.

recordsAccepted.description: Number of records successfully accepted by the target.

recordsRejected.description: Number of records rejected (validation errors or target refusals).

validationReport.description: Per-record validation errors from the target.

artefactRef.description: Reference to the produced XML/report stored as an OR file attachment (legally required retention). Null if no artefact was produced.

connectorRunId.description: The OpenConnector run/execution ID returned by the connector after the job is dispatched. Used for status polling and audit.

errorMessage.description: Human-readable error message when the job fails (e.g. 'OpenConnector connection bron-rod not found').

originFlagId.description: UUID of an AttendanceFlag that auto-queued this job (e.g. a leerplicht threshold crossing). Null for manually-requested jobs.

lifecycle.description: Job lifecycle state. OSO target: queued → pending-parent-review → running → succeeded|failed|partial. Other targets: queued → running → succeeded|failed|partial.

pendingParentReview.description: OSO jobs enter this state so the dossier can be reviewed by a parent before sending.

approveDossier.description: Parent approves the OSO dossier; job proceeds to running.

run.description: Non-OSO jobs: direct queued → running. OSO jobs: blocked by DataExchangeRunGuard (must go via pending-parent-review → approveDossier).

durationSeconds.description: Duration of job execution in seconds (finishedAt - startedAt). Null until the job is finished.

successRate.description: Fraction of records accepted (recordsAccepted / recordsProcessed). Null until finished or if no records were processed.

GradeNotification.title: GradeNotification
GradeNotification.description: Lightweight parent-notification record created by GradeRollupHandler when a GradeEntry publishes. Contains no grade values — only the fields needed to dispatch the notification to a parent. Records are append-only. The canonical GradeEntry is never modified during fan-out (fixes #183, wave-12 WF4).

recipient.description: Nextcloud user ID of the notification recipient (parent).

sourceId.description: UUID or id of the source GradeEntry that triggered this notification.

learnerId.description: Nextcloud user ID of the learner whose grade was published.

courseId.description: UUID of the associated Course. Null when not applicable.
